model_answer: This picture shows a quiet park on a sunny morning. In the foreground on the left, an elderly man wearing a grey cardigan and a flat cap is sitting on a green wooden bench, reading his newspaper. The bench sits in the shade of a large oak tree behind him. In the centre of the park there is a round stone fountain with a small jet of water. On the right in the foreground, a red and white checked picnic blanket is spread on the grass with a wicker basket on it, and a small tan dog with a red collar is sniffing around next to it. Far away on the left, beyond the oak tree, a small pond ringed by a stand of trees glints in the morning light, where a small brown dog is sniffing at the water's edge, and a few flowering bushes grow across the back of the lawn. In the background on the right, a young woman in a bright orange running jacket is jogging along a gravel path that curves past the fountain toward the back of the park. Overall, it looks like a calm and peaceful start to the day.

spatial_relationships.subject: o_pastry_case
spatial_relationships.relation: is at the right end of

model_answer: This is a busy corner café on a rainy morning. Behind the counter at the back, a barista in a black apron is steaming milk at a chrome espresso machine, and a chalkboard menu hangs above her. At the right end of the counter there is a glass pastry case full of croissants, and a man in a navy suit is waiting in front of it, checking his phone while holding a wet umbrella. In the foreground on the right, a student wearing headphones is typing on a laptop at a small window table; you can see rain streaking the glass behind him. In the back left corner, a mother in a yellow raincoat is wiping the table while her little boy kneels on his chair and waves at the door. Next to the entrance, a metal umbrella stand is already crowded with dripping umbrellas, with a leafy potted fern standing beside it. Three matching marble-topped bistro tables are dotted around the room, and at each one sits what looks like the same man in a different coloured t-shirt — one in red reading the sports pages under a warm brass pendant lamp, one in green typing on a laptop, and one in blue drinking a flat white. A narrow bookshelf full of worn paperbacks stands against the back wall, and a station clock with a brass rim hangs high above the pastry case. All along the left wall the shop shows off its coffee gear — a wooden rack hung with colourful mugs, a shelf of copper pots with an antique hand grinder, and two burlap sacks of roasted beans, one spilling open on the floor — so it is clearly a proper coffee shop on a wet and hectic morning.

anomaly.description: a man waiting for the bus in full scuba gear, including a mask, wetsuit, and flippers
anomaly.why_unusual: scuba equipment belongs in the ocean, not at a dry city bus stop nowhere near water, and flippers make it almost impossible to walk onto a bus
anomaly.position: middle of the queue, foreground centre

model_answer: This picture shows an ordinary city bus stop on a clear afternoon, but something very strange is happening. In the middle of the queue, a man is waiting for the bus dressed in a full scuba wetsuit, with a diving mask on his face and flippers on his feet, calmly holding a transit pass. This is bizarre because there is no water anywhere nearby — scuba gear belongs in the ocean, and it would be almost impossible to climb onto a bus wearing flippers. The people around him have clearly noticed: the woman in a trench coat at the front of the queue keeps glancing sideways at him while pretending to check her watch, and the teenager behind him is openly taking a photo with his phone. Behind them is a normal glass bus shelter with a route map, a metal bench with someone's briefcase on it, and a route 42 sign at the kerb. The street around them is full of ordinary city details — a litter bin and a green recycling bin to the right, a tall street lamp and a red post box further back, a fire hydrant, a stone planter of shrubs and a row of bike racks by the kerb, a line of black-and-yellow bollards with a stray traffic cone, and a few pigeons pecking at the pavement — all of which makes the diver stand out even more. Perhaps he lost a bet, or he is on his way to a costume party.

model_answer: This picture shows a busy sandy beach on a sunny late afternoon. In the foreground on the right, an elderly man in a straw hat is dozing in a navy deck chair under a big red and white striped umbrella, while next to him a woman in a wide sunhat sits in a striped chair reading a magazine, with a yellow towel spread on the sand beside her. On the left in the foreground, a small boy in blue trunks kneels to pat a lumpy sandcastle topped with a little flag, his bucket and spade tipped over next to it. In the middle of the scene a man in green shorts tosses a beach ball, and on the right a young man in a wetsuit walks down toward the water past his surfboard standing upright in the sand. Further back, a woman in a red swimsuit wades into the sea, a jogger runs along the shoreline by a wooden lifeguard tower, and an ice-cream vendor leans out of his striped cart to serve a cone, with a tall palm leaning over the sand. Far out on the water a small white sailboat drifts past, and overall it looks like a relaxed, happy day at the seaside.
